title: tipularia japonica f. harae
intro: Tipularia japonica f. harae, also known as Japanese golden-hued fairy bell or Japanese fairy bell, is a flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tipularia japonica f. harae include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
